positive: A vibrant synthwave landscape illustration. Neon grid lines receding into a futuristic sunset, flanked by stylized palm trees and a chrome sports car. Vaporwave aesthetic, cyberpunk influences, deep magenta and cyan color palette, vector art style, 80s retro futurism.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, natural elements, sepia tone
